# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(req: NextRequest) {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new NextResponse('Method Not Allowed', { status: 405 });
  }

  try {
    // Parse the request body
    const body = await req.json();

    // Extract headers and content from the body
    const headers = new Headers(body.headers);
    const content = body.content;

    // Create a ReadableStream from the content
    const readableStream = new ReadableStream({
      start(controller) {
        controller.enqueue(content);
        controller.close();
      },
    });

    // Return a Response with the ReadableStream and provided headers
    return new NextResponse(readableStream, { headers });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error processing request:', error);
    return new NextResponse('Internal Server Error', { status: 500 });
  }
}
